review_title: More pro active and enjoyed meeting with people
review_body_text: Enhanced my customer service skills and negotiation with doing sales with the target given.Setup seminar talk for ASB and cross sell for ASB loan.More pro active when dealling with customer and peoples and need to built repport with developer for mortgage loan.
a fun working place with many benefits. gain more knowledge in banking skills, loans, mortgage, insurance, unit trust and many more. fast increment in salary.

Different branch different kind of environment with different types of leader. Ive been in a productive branch but in a rural area. A productive activities is only on the operation sides while on a sales activities we have to struggle more in order to achieve our monthly target.
Learned how to manage customers. It is tough but very challeging. The enviroment is superb. Good managements. Sporting managers. Friendly peoples.

Maybank is a very competitive organisation. It offers a great opportunity for you to develop and explore yourself. The management are very supportive in pushing you to deliver what you are supposed to.
Good benefit Learn many from.other dept Compliance issue hardest part Service many people at different level More alert internal and external fraud
- One of the best compensation in the industry - Big ambition for Asia - Quite process heavy - Good and competent people - Not for the weak-spirited -

The best experience while working in maybank when our KPI performance is either on target or exceed target. Meaning we delivered our tasks in timely manner or performance rating could be better than higher management expectation. The reason why bonus will be paid based on rating percentage and key performance in our KPI. Our employer never failed to pay bonus to entire staff except for those who didn't perform well. In additional, we also will be getting an ESOS, equity shareholders. Meaning all Maybankers beneficial will be entitled an ESOS offer depends on their level or position. The higher position is the better ESOS offered. Medical benefits is the most important and the most valuable HR benefit for Maybankers. It will covers a staff and also a family members where it won't be as same as with any other sectors of financial institution or company locally.
pros_text: Good to work in permanently because of HR benefits
cons_text: Management didn't bother their staffs who suffering with internal political issues

review_body_text: Initial Class .................... Customer Relations Skills Basic Banking Facilities Grooming Private Courses ............................ Short Hand Typing Banking Diploma

review_title: Very good company with all the benefits but when you're looking for career advancement, its hard to go further
review_body_text: Typical Day: It's good, work life balancing Learned: A culture, new task and new prospect Management: not really sustain and they keep on changing the management based on the current economy status Co Workers: good and cooperative Hardest: When the directions given by superior not reached to the staffs Enjoyable time: working hours flexible and benefits

review_title: Very busy enviroment, need to skip your meals sometimes. Need to be patience.
review_body_text: Good place to work and to gain exprience. Excellence for begginers in banking job. Best benefit for overral staff. Presure in work extremely at a high nod. Worst moment when your clerical staff make a mistake and the customer do not want to tolerate. The process of daily work is a life long leaning journey in banking job.
pros_text: caring sarbodinates.Excellence place for banking beginners.
cons_text: work long hours, Cost priority management.

review_title: productive & great workplace. we can learn various new things
review_body_text: I loved my last job. It taught me so many things and my previous boss and colleagues have always been helpful. typical day at work sometimes quite boring as it involves mostly on the system.

I need to build and maintain close business relationship with the Emerging Affluent (EF) customers by providing and offering various Maybank products especially insurance and investment products. I have to provide a complete range of investment products and other banking products to affluent customers.

The office provide its own cafe where we can just go eat or drinks anytime for free. I learned how to promote the Maybank product, the right way to set an appointment and learn the way to present to client. The hardest part is to get an appoinment with client. The most enjoyable part is we can travel anywhere to meet up with the clinet.

I ve started my career in maybank as a clerk. I growth greatly in maybank . I see a lots of tranformation . I earn so much benefit during my day in maybank. For me, the best employer in malaysia is maybank. I felt regret leaving mahbank in year 2015 where I insist to take a challlenge become a manager in rhb. But in maybank... the promotion is limited for each branch every year . So if you want something fastrack for career, you definately wont easily get . As many of senior staff waiting for long.

review_title: A boring place to work but alot of benefits
review_body_text: MYOB colleagues but have a lot of benefits as a employee of Maybank. Work under high pressure and sometimes they will be free foods given. Only SOMETIMES.
Good company amd i learned lot of new things and the system...im in card activation department...receive call from customer and activate the new credit card for them
we had a good team work, where we are comfortable working with each other. Beside, good management leads to good environment of working.

Many experienced and exposure provided by the company to me. Various opportunity given to explore about the system and management environment. The most hardest part is to handling people behavior during provide the service or working related. And the most exciting part is once facing new challenges.
Learn many things such as on to deal with bankers and vendors Brainstorming skill Team work with colleagues Handle on how to solve problems Manage time to solve the important issues
